lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: *hic* G'day! Do ya... ... well, do ya need any help with yer trident? *buuurrrp*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bit early to be drinking, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: Why?! What time *hic* is it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, I've no idea.

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: I can drink to that!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: What!? Why I'm the infamous pirate Lieve McCracken! You've not heard of me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, can't say I have.

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: I'm wanted in several *hic* kingdoms - murder, armed robbery and even *hic* flag desecration!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Shouldn't you be in hiding?

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: I'm sorry, but *hic* do ya see anyone here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess you could call this hiding. If you're some famous pirate, where's you ship?

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: *hic* My last expedition didn't end too well for my boat... or crew *hic*.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, what's in the cave?

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: The fruits o' my labour... and some waterfiends, those were a surprise *hic* to be sure, but a welcome one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Umm, fruits?

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: Oh, not *hic* actual fruits, silly! A relative o' mine wanted a cave full o' Krakens, so here *hic* I am.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And why are you so drunk?

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: Well, the Krakens destroyed m' ship, killed m' crew, the rum it's... all I 'ave left.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry about that, so... Can I kill some Krakens?

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: If you've been assigned some by a slayer master, I don't see *hic* why not.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And if I havn't been?

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: Then ya can leave m' Krakens *hic* alone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Umm... ok then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about tridents.

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: If ya brings me a trident, I can enhance it for ya. It'll store 20,000 charges, not just 2,500. But I wants payin' fer the job.

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: Give me 10 kraken tentacles first. I'll hold onto 'em for ya. Then ya can bring me a trident to enhance, an' I'll get to work for ya.

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: If ya brings me a trident, I can enhance it for ya. It'll store 20,000 charges, not just 2,500. Ya brought me one tentacle so far, but I'll want 10 of 'em to do the job.

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: Just pass me 9 more tentacles, then give me yer trident an' I'll get to work for ya.

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: If ya brings me a trident, I can enhance it for ya. It'll store 20,000 charges, not just 2,500. Ya brought me [number] tentacles so far, but I'll want 10 of 'em to do the job.

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: Just pass me [number] more tentacles, then give me yer trident an' I'll get to work for ya.

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: If ya brings me a trident, I can enhance it for ya. It'll store 20,000 charges, not just 2,500. Ya brought me 9 tentacles so far, but I'll want 10 of 'em to do the job.

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: Just pass me one more tentacle, then give me yer trident an' I'll get to work for ya.

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: If ya brings me a trident, I can enhance it for ya. It'll store 20,000 charges, not just 2,500. Ya brought me [number] tentacles; I'll use up 10 of 'em to do the job.

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: Just pass me yer trident an' I'll get to work for ya.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be, heh, leaving you now...

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: Wow, so original.

sections.title: When attempting to kill cave krakens outside of a slayer task

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: Oi, I'm Lieve McCracken and I say leave m' Kraken alone!

sections.title: When attempting to kill waterfiends outside of a slayer task

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: Oi, I'm Lieve, and I say leave it!

sections.title: Charged or uncharged Trident of the seas & Trident of the swamp with 0-9 kraken tentacles stored

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: Ya gotta bring me 10 tentacles before I'll enhance yer tridents for ya. Just hand 'em to me when ye've got 'em.

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: Ya gotta bring me 10 tentacles before I'll enhance yer tridents for ya. So far ya brought me one.

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: Ya gotta bring me 10 tentacles before I'll enhance yer tridents for ya. So far ya brought me [number].

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: That trident's already been enhanced, ya ninny!

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: Remember, I won't give 'em back. Once ya gives me a tentacle, I keep it.

lines.speaker: Lieve McCracken
lines.text: Thanks. I've got one tentacle stored for ya now. Once ye've brought me 10, ya can hand me a trident, an' I'll enhance it.
